common.no_command_permission: ❌ You do not have permission to use this command.
common.guild_only: ❌ This command can only be used inside a server.
language.set:
✅ Server language set to **{language}**.
Responses in this server will now use this language where available.
language.reset: ✅ Server language reset to the default (**{default}**).
language.cmd_desc:
Current language: **{current}**

Use the dropdown below to change the language the bot replies in. Only languages that have a translation file are listed.
language.help_text:
Want the bot in your language, or spotted a wrong translation? You can help! Add or fix translations on our GitHub. Feel free to create a brand new language, just follow the guidelines in the repo and upload it.
{url}
tracking.force_no_entries: ⚠️ No entries were posted - these users have no diary entries to show yet.
tracking.no_post_channel: ⚠️ No post channel set - use /setchannel to see diary entries
tracking.optin_admin_only: ❌ Only Discord Administrators can opt in to the global stats leaderboard.
tracking.optin_public_desc:
Your server name will now appear in the `/stats` global leaderboard.

You can change this anytime with `/setanonymous`.
tracking.optin_private_desc:
Your server will appear as **Guild #XXXX** in the global leaderboard.

You can opt-in anytime via `/setanonymous`, `/settings`, or the `/stats` view.
tracking.mention_required:
❌ **A Discord @mention is required when adding users.**
Use `/adduser username:serializd_username discord_user:@Member`.

This is enforced to prevent fake or mass entries.
tracking.already_linked:
❌ {user} is already linked to **{username}**.
Use `/edituser` to update their linked username, or `/removeuser {username}` to remove them first.
tracking.user_opted_out_add:
❌ {user} has opted out of tracking in this server.
They need to use `/opt-in` in this server before they can be added.
tracking.provide_one: ❌ Please provide at least one username.
tracking.all_already: ⚠️ All provided usernames are already being tracked:
tracking.perm_send:
❌ I don't have permission to send messages in {channel}!
Please give me **Send Messages** and **Embed Links** permissions in that channel.
tracking.perm_embed:
❌ I don't have permission to embed links in {channel}!
Please give me **Embed Links** permission in that channel.
tracking.dm_added_title: 👀 You've been added to diary tracking
tracking.dm_added_desc:
You've been added to Serializd diary tracking in **{guild}**.

Your [Serializd](https://serializd.com) diary entries will be automatically posted there.

Not okay with that? Use `/opt-out` in **{guild}** to remove yourself and block future adds.
You can always reverse it with `/opt-in`.
tracking.linked_confirm: 🔗 Linked {user} to **{username}** - they will be auto-removed from tracking if they leave the server.
tracking.optin_prompt_desc:
Your server is currently **private** in the `/stats` global leaderboard (shown as Guild #XXXX).

Would you like to make your guild name **public** so others can see it?

**Only a Discord Administrator can opt in.**
tracking.optin_prompt_footer: {footer} - You can change this anytime with /setanonymous
tracking.unverified_desc:
The following username(s) returned no diary entries and may be incorrect:

{links}

**Possible reasons:**
- Username is misspelled (check exact casing)
- Profile or diary is set to private
- Account has no diary entries yet

Click **Add Anyway** to track them regardless, or **Skip** to ignore them.
tracking.not_linked:
⚠️ {user} is not linked to any tracked Serializd username.
Use `/listusers` to see tracked users, or specify a Serializd username directly.
tracking.not_tracked_short: ⚠️ **{username}** is not in the tracked list.
tracking.remove_confirm_desc:
Are you sure you want to stop tracking **{username}**?

• All diary entries from this user will stop being posted
• This action cannot be undone
tracking.provide_user_or_mention: ❌ Please provide either a Serializd username or a Discord @mention to remove.
tracking.none_tracked: ⚠️ No users are currently being tracked.
tracking.cleared_desc:
Successfully removed **{count}** tracked user(s).

All diary tracking has been cleared for this server.
tracking.clearall_desc:
Are you sure you want to remove **ALL {count} tracked users** from this server?

**This will:**
• Stop tracking all diary entries
• Clear all seen entry history
• This action cannot be undone

**Users to be removed:**
{users}
tracking.edit_not_tracked:
⚠️ **{username}** is not currently being tracked.
Use `/adduser` to add them first.
tracking.user_opted_out_link:
❌ {user} has opted out of tracking in this server.
They need to use `/opt-in` in this server before they can be linked.
tracking.edit_updated:
✅ Updated {user}'s linked username from **{old}** to **{new}**.
They will be auto-removed from tracking if they leave the server.
💡 `/profile {user}` will now show their profile.
tracking.edit_linked:
✅ Linked {user} to **{username}**.
They will be auto-removed from tracking if they leave the server.
💡 `/profile {user}` will now show their profile.
tracking.test_ok_value:
**SUCCESS!** Found {n} diary entries.
This user can be tracked.
tracking.test_fail_value:
**FAILED** - Could not fetch diary entries.

**Possible causes:**
• Username is incorrect (check spelling/case)
• Profile doesn't exist
• Profile/diary is private
• User has no diary entries yet

**Solutions:**
• Verify username at the profile URL above
• Check if diary is viewable in incognito mode
• Try a different username
setup.lang_desc:
Pick the language the bot replies in for this server. You can change it anytime with `/language`.

Partially-translated languages fall back to English for anything not yet translated.
setup.welcome_desc:
Thanks for adding me to **{guild}**!

I'll help you track [Serializd](https://www.serializd.com/) diary entries and share them with your community. This wizard will guide you through the setup process.

**📝 Note:** You'll need a Serializd account to track your TV show activity.

**What we'll configure:**
📺 Diary post channel
📡 Optional: New episode alerts channel
📢 Optional: Bot update notifications
💬 Optional: Command restrictions
🔗 Optional: Sharelink channel
🎨 Optional: Custom embed colors

💡 **Tip:** Use `/features` after setup to see everything this bot can do.
setup.features_desc: Here's everything I can help you with:
setup.feat_diary_value:
• Auto-post new diary entries from tracked members
• Shows ratings, reviews, and episode info
• Direct links to Serializd entries
• Checks for new entries every {minutes}
setup.feat_recaps_value:
• Automatic weekly & monthly recap summaries
• Top shows, entry counts, and highlights
• Posted to your diary channel
setup.feat_alerts_value:
• Announces when tracked shows air new episodes
• Based on members' watching lists
• Set a dedicated channel in optional channels
setup.feat_profiles_value:
• `/profile @member` - Browse any tracked member's diary
• Filter by ratings, genres, or time periods
• Interactive buttons for easy navigation
setup.feat_social_value:
• `/sharelink` - Share your Serializd, Letterboxd and other profiles
• Find watch buddies in your server
• Set a dedicated sharelink channel
setup.feat_custom_value:
• Custom embed colors per server
• Role-based command restrictions
• Separate channels for different features
• Privacy-focused with auto-cleanup
setup.feat_next_value: Let's get started with the basic setup!
setup.post_desc:
Select a channel where diary entries will be posted.

**What gets posted here:**
• New diary entries from tracked members
• Show title, rating, review, and episode info
• Weekly & monthly recap summaries
• Direct links to Serializd entries

**Posted to a separate channel (optional):**
• New episode alerts for shows on members' watching lists
setup.post_tips_value:
• Choose a dedicated channel for entries
• Can be changed later with `/setchannel`
• Entries post every {minutes} when new
setup.post_adding_value:
After setup, use `/adduser` to add members:
`/adduser username:serializd_name discord_user:@Member`

Both fields are required - each Discord member can only be linked to one Serializd username.
setup.opt_changelog_hint: Get notified about new features, bug fixes, and improvements
setup.opt_commands_hint: Restrict bot commands to specific channel (keeps other channels clean)
setup.opt_sharelink_hint: Let members share their Serializd/Letterboxd profiles (social feature)
setup.opt_newep_hint: Automatically announce when tracked shows air new episodes
setup.opt_tip_value: These can all be configured later using admin commands!
setup.custom_desc: Make the bot match your server's style!
setup.custom_color_value:
Choose from preset colors below, or use `/setcolor` later for custom hex codes!

**This embed shows your current color!**
setup.custom_other_value:
• `/roleadd` / `/roleremove` - Assign users or roles to permission groups
• `/roleview` - Manage which commands each group can access
• `/setcolor #HEX` - Use any custom hex color
• `/admininfo` - See all server settings
setup.summary_desc: **{guild}** is now configured and ready to go!
setup.summary_next_value:
• New diary entries will auto-post every {minutes}
• Use `/settings` to customize diary appearance
• Try `/groupdiary` for multi-episode tracking
• Run `/setup` again anytime to reconfigure
setup.summary_adding_value:
Use `/adduser` to start tracking members:
`/adduser username:serializd_name discord_user:@Member`

• Both fields are required - each Discord member can only be linked to one Serializd username
• Use `/edituser` to update an existing link
• Use `/listusers` to see who is currently tracked
setup.summary_essential_value:
**User Management:**
`/adduser` - Track a user (requires @mention)
`/edituser` - Update a user's Discord link
`/listusers` - See tracked users

**Customization:**
`/settings` - Customize diary entries
`/groupdiary` - Multi-episode embeds

**Info:**
`/admininfo` - View all settings
`/commands` - See all commands
setup.cancelled_desc:
Setup has been cancelled. Your previous configuration (if any) remains unchanged.

Run `/setup` again anytime to configure the bot!
setup.post_perm_error:
❌ I don't have permission to send messages in {channel}!
Please give me **{perms}** permissions in that channel.
setup.ch_diary_enabled: ✅ Diary entries will be posted in {channel}.
setup.ch_commands_enabled: ✅ Bot commands can now only be used in {channel}.
setup.ch_commands_disabled: ✅ Command channel restriction removed. Commands can be used anywhere
setup.ch_changelog_enabled: ✅ Bot updates will be posted in {channel}.
setup.ch_new_episodes_disabled: ✅ New episodes channel removed. Watching list tracking disabled
setup.ch_auditlogs_disabled: ✅ Audit log channel removed. Changes will no longer be auto-posted
setup.ch_auditlogs_enabled: Settings changes will be auto-posted to {channel}
setup.ch_auditlogs_logged_value:
All settings changes made by admins will be automatically posted here, including:
- Channel changes (diary, changelog, etc.)
- Embed color, anonymous mode, customization
- Diary field toggles and format settings
- Group diary settings
- User add/remove events
- And more
setup.ch_newep_enabled: New episode announcements will be posted in {channel}
setup.ch_newep_how_value:
- The bot tracks all shows in your tracked users' **Watching Lists**
- When a new episode airs (based on TVMaze airdates), it's announced here
- If multiple users are watching the same show, only one announcement is posted
- Announcements post when the episode airs according to its timezone
setup.anon_status_desc: Current privacy settings for this server in `/stats` global leaderboards:
setup.anon_status_footer: Use /setanonymous guild_name: or usernames: to change settings
setup.anon_public_desc: Your server name is now **public** in global `/stats`.
setup.anon_updated_footer: Changes apply to /stats global leaderboards only
social.need_one:
❌ You must provide at least one username.
**Enabled platforms in this server:** {platforms}
social.no_enabled: None - ask an admin to enable some in `/settings`
social.too_long: ❌ {label} username must be {max} characters or less.
social.invalid_chars: ❌ {label} username contains invalid characters. Only letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and dots are allowed.
social.already_submitted: ❌ You've already submitted a sharelink! Use `/sharelink edit` to update it, or ask an admin to use `/sharelink clear` to reset it.
social.no_channel_set: ❌ Sharelink channel hasn't been set yet. Ask an admin to configure it in `/settings`.
social.channel_not_found: ❌ Sharelink channel not found! Ask an admin to reconfigure it.
social.posted: ✅ Your sharelink has been posted in {channel}!
social.not_submitted: ❌ You haven't submitted a sharelink yet. Use `/sharelink add` to submit one.
social.updated_reposted: ✅ Sharelink updated! (Original embed was deleted - re-posted in {channel})
social.updated_no_channel: ✅ Sharelink updated in the database, but the channel couldn't be found to edit the embed.

social.clear_confirm_desc:
Are you sure you want to clear the sharelink for {user}?

- Their current sharelink will be deleted
- They will be able to submit a new one

Full list: <https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones>

This overrides the server default for you.

usettings.tz_guild_set:
✅ Server default timezone set to **{tz}**.
Users who haven't set their own timezone will use this.
usettings.tz_view_hint: Change yours with `/timezone set`. Admins can set the server default with `/timezone guild`.
usettings.optout_remove_line: • Remove **{username}** from diary tracking in this server
usettings.optout_prevent_line: • Prevent admins from adding you again
usettings.optout_reverse_line: You can reverse this anytime with `/opt-in`.
usettings.already_opted_out:
✅ You're already opted out of tracking in this server.
Use `/opt-in` if you'd like to allow tracking again.
usettings.optin_desc:
**Opting in will:**
• Allow admins to add you to diary tracking again

You can opt back out anytime with `/opt-out`.
usettings.not_opted_out: ℹ️ You're not opted out in this server - admins can already add you to tracking.
usettings.opted_out_desc:
You've been opted out of tracking in this server.{removed}

Admins can no longer add you. Use `/opt-in` to reverse this.
usettings.opted_in_desc:
Admins can now add you to diary tracking again.
Use `/opt-out` anytime to reverse this.

stats.optin_admin_only: ❌ Only Discord Administrators can opt in to showing the guild name in global stats.
stats.optin_public_desc: Your server name is now **public** in global stats. Change it anytime with `/setanonymous`.
stats.optin_done: ✅ Guild name is now **public** in global stats. You can change this anytime with `/setanonymous`.

stats.win_guild_desc: Top watcher and show each month in **{guild}**
stats.win_guild_no_data: No data recorded for {year} in **{guild}** yet.
group.mixed_value: Entries from multiple seasons ({seasons}) were grouped together. This is unexpected.
recap.summary_empty:
No diary entries were logged this period.

**Possible reasons:**
• No tracked users logged anything on Serializd
• No users are tracked yet - use `/adduser` to add some
• The post channel may not be set - use `/setchannel` to configure it
roles.title: ⚙️ Role Permissions
roles.userlist_desc: Members and roles assigned to each permission group.
roles.note_value: Discord Administrators always have full access regardless of group assignments.
roles.toggle_value: Use the dropdown below to enable or disable individual commands for this group.
cfgshare.footer: Note: channel and role settings are not included in config codes.
cfgshare.apply_admin_only: ❌ Only Discord Administrators can apply an imported config.
cfgshare.note_existing:
Your code is `{code}`. Share it with other server admins to copy these settings.
Use `/exportconfig regenerate:True` to get a new code.
cfgshare.note_replaced:
Previous code `{old}` has been replaced.
Share `{code}` with other server admins to copy these settings.
cfgshare.note_new: Share `{code}` with other server admins to copy these settings.
cfgshare.reset_desc:
**This will reset all settings to their defaults.**
Channel and role settings are unchanged.
cfgshare.invalid_format: ❌ Invalid code format. Codes look like `SRZ-A3B7C9D2`. Use `default` to reset all settings.
cfgshare.not_found: ❌ Code `{code}` not found. Make sure it was copied correctly.
cfgshare.corrupted: ❌ Config data is corrupted. Ask the original server to re-export.
patreon.hof_desc:
These amazing people made a one-time commitment to keep the bot alive & thriving forever. Their names are etched here permanently, thank you from the bottom of my heart!

**Hall of Fame Members:**
patreon.hof_footer: Spots are forever after 1 month of qualifying support, your name stays here eternally!
patreon.color_reset: ✅ Embed color reset to default purple (`#6C63FF`)
patreon.color_updated_desc:
New color: `#{hex}`
All embeds will now use this color.
patreon.color_preview_desc:
Preview of new color: `#{hex}`

This will change the color of all bot embeds in this server.
You can reset to default anytime with `/setcolor default`
patreon.color_preview_footer: You have 60 seconds to confirm or cancel
patreon.color_timeout_desc: Color change cancelled - no response received
patreon.color_invalid:

yumi.title: This is my cute cat Yumi ♡
settings.diary_required: ❌ Diary channel is required and cannot be disabled.
settings.ch_disabled_newep: ✅ New episodes channel disabled. Watching list tracking stopped.

💡 Recaps will start from the next completed week/month.

settings.ch_set_sharelink: ✅ Sharelinks will now be sent to {channel}

settings.drop_desc_audit_only: Post in /settings audit channel if set
settings.drop_desc_audit_then_dm: Fallback to DM to the server owner

*New entries will use this color.*
settings.color_save_failed: ❌ Failed to save the embed color. Please try again.
settings.footer: Settings apply only to this server
settings.main_desc: Select the category you would like to configure:
settings.main_diary_value: Control which fields appear in logged entries and customize their labels
settings.main_group_value: Automatically group multiple episodes into one embed
settings.main_channels_value: Configure which channels the bot posts to
settings.main_custom_value: Set embed color, anonymous mode, and more
settings.main_recaps_value: Auto-post weekly and monthly activity recaps to a channel
settings.main_sharelinks_value: Toggle which social platforms users can submit in `/sharelink`
settings.main_roles_value:
👑 **Admin:** {admin} assignment(s) - full access
🛡️ **Mod:** {mod} assignment(s) - adduser/removeuser & user management
👤 **User:** everyone by default
Click **Role Permissions** below to manage groups and toggle commands.
settings.diary_desc: Customize how diary entries look in **{guild}**
settings.diary_commands_value:
**Configuration Commands:**
• `/diary fields` → Toggle fields & watch filter
• `/diary format` → Thumbnail, timestamp, author, ping
• `/diary changename [field] [name]` → Customize labels
settings.channels_desc: Configure which channels the bot posts to in **{guild}**
settings.channels_help:
Click the buttons below to change channel settings.
*Note: Only the Diary Posts Channel is required.*

💡 **New Episodes:** Tracks users' watching lists and announces when shows air!
settings.custom_desc: Customize the bot's appearance and behavior in **{guild}**
settings.custom_help:
Click the buttons below to customize settings.
*Embed color affects all diary posts in this server.*
*Guild Name / Usernames buttons toggle visibility in `/stats` global leaderboard.*
*Drop-Warning Delivery controls where the bot warns you when a diary post is dropped after retries.*
*(Requires Discord Administrator permission.)*
settings.group_desc: Configure how multiple episodes are grouped in **{guild}**
settings.group_cmds_advanced:
**Configuration Commands:**
• `/groupdiary mode` `/groupdiary time` → Mode & timing
• `/groupdiary fields` → Toggle fields, runtime, year
• `/groupdiary format` → Title, author, thumbnail, reviews
settings.sharelinks_desc:
Manage which social platforms users can submit in **{guild}**.
Use the dropdown below to toggle each platform on or off. Existing embeds will update automatically.
settings.sharelinks_help:
- Users submit with `/sharelink add`
- Users edit their link with `/sharelink edit`
- Admins clear a link with `/sharelink clear`
settings.prompt_diary: Select the channel for diary posts:
settings.prompt_changelog: Select the channel for bot updates (or skip to disable):
settings.prompt_sharelink: Select the channel for sharelink posts (or skip to disable):
settings.prompt_sharelink_short: Select the channel for sharelink posts:
settings.prompt_newep: Select the channel for new episode announcements (or skip to disable):
settings.prompt_recap: Select the channel for weekly/monthly recaps:
settings.prompt_audit: Select the channel for audit log auto-posts (or skip to disable):
settings.recap_ch_disabled: ✅ Recap channel disabled. Recaps will no longer be posted.
settings.color_reset: ✅ Embed color reset to default purple (`#6C63FF`)
settings.drop_prompt: Pick where the bot should send warnings when a diary post is dropped after retry exhaustion (most common cause: missing channel permissions). Warnings are throttled to once per 24 h per server.
settings.privacy_admin_only: ❌ Only Discord Administrators can change global stats privacy settings.
settings.gname_public_desc: Your server name is now **public** in global stats. Reopen `/settings` to see the menu.
settings.gname_result: ✅ Guild name in global stats is now **{status}**.
settings.unames_result: ✅ Serializd usernames in global stats are now **{status}**.
settings.df_desc: Configure which fields appear in diary entries
settings.df_footer: Use the dropdowns to toggle fields
settings.thread_perms_note: ⚠️ Requires **Create Public Threads** + **Send Messages in Threads** permissions
settings.dfmt_footer: Use the dropdowns to change formatting
settings.auto_thread_enabled:
✅ **Auto Thread enabled**
A thread will be created on each diary embed with the title:
`Show Name · SX · EN`

⚠️ **Required bot permissions in the diary channel:**
- **Create Public Threads** - lets the bot open threads on messages
- **Send Messages in Threads** - lets the bot post inside threads
- **Manage Threads** - needed if you want the bot to rename threads as groups grow

*(Server Settings → Roles → Bot role, or set per-channel in Channel Settings → Permissions)*
settings.gf_desc: Configure which fields appear in group diary embeds
settings.thread_perms_note_g: ⚠️ Requires **Create Public Threads** + **Send Messages in Threads** + **Manage Threads** permissions
settings.g_auto_thread_enabled:
✅ **Auto Thread enabled for Group Diary**
A thread will be created on the first diary embed for a show/season, titled:
`Show Name · SX · EN`
As more episodes are logged, the thread name updates to show the full range:
`Show Name · S1 · E1-12`

⚠️ **Required bot permissions in the diary channel:**
- **Create Public Threads** - lets the bot open threads on messages
- **Send Messages in Threads** - lets the bot post inside threads
- **Manage Threads** - lets the bot rename the thread as the episode range grows

*(Server Settings → Roles → Bot role, or set per-channel in Channel Settings → Permissions)*
audit.title: ⚙️ Audit Log - {cat}
audit.delivery_failed: ⚠️ Action completed, but audit log delivery failed - check audit channel permissions.
settings.dlink_yes_btn: Yes, make guild public and set link
settings.dlink_admin_only: ❌ Only Discord Administrators can opt in to the global stats leaderboard.
settings.dlink_cancel_desc:
Guild name remains private. No link was set.

Use `/setanonymous` to change privacy settings.
settings.gstatus_footer: Use /groupdiary mode or /groupdiary time to change settings
settings.gtime_invalid:

Range: 1-1440 minutes
settings.gtime_set: ✅ Group Diary time window set to: **{time}**
settings.dlink_removed_desc: Your guild name will no longer be clickable in global stats.
settings.dlink_remove_confirm:
Are you sure you want to remove the Discord invite link?

Your guild name will no longer be clickable in the global stats leaderboard.
settings.dlink_invalid:
❌ Invalid Discord invite link format.

**Valid formats:**
• `discord.gg/yourcode`
• `https://discord.gg/yourcode`
• `https://discord.com/invite/yourcode`

**To remove:** `/setdiscordlink remove`
settings.dlink_private_desc:
Your guild name is **private** in the global stats leaderboard (shown as Guild #XXXX).

A Discord invite link only shows when your guild name is **public**.

Would you like to make your guild name public and set the invite link?
settings.dlink_private_footer: Only Discord Administrators can opt in
bg.drop_intro: A diary entry for **{username}** was dropped after {retries} failed delivery attempts.
bg.drop_cause_perms:
**Likely cause:** the bot is missing `Send Messages` or `Embed Links` in **#{channel}**.

**Fix:**
- Grant the bot role those permissions in that channel, or
- Move diary posts elsewhere with `/setchannel`.

Posts will keep dropping silently until permissions are restored.
bg.drop_cause_network:
**Likely cause:** a temporary network or Serializd/Discord API problem while posting to **#{channel}** (the bot has the required permissions).

No action is usually needed - delivery should resume automatically once the issue clears. If entries keep dropping, check the bot's status.
bg.drop_footer: To change or disable this warning: /settings → Customization → Drop-Warning Delivery
bg.thread_perm_desc:
The bot tried to create a thread on a diary entry but was denied.

**Please grant the bot role the following permissions in this channel:**
- **Create Public Threads** - lets the bot open threads on diary embeds
- **Send Messages in Threads** - lets the bot post inside those threads
- **Manage Threads** - lets the bot rename threads as episode ranges grow

*(Channel Settings → Permissions → Bot role, or Server Settings → Roles → Bot role)*

Auto Thread will work automatically once permissions are granted.
bg.review_desc:
If you're enjoying Serializd Tracker Bot, please consider leaving a review on Top.gg!

🔗 [Leave a Review](https://top.gg/bot/1476015649775157369#reviews)

We appreciate all support and reviews! They help other servers discover the bot.

*This is a one-time message.*
bg.welcome_desc:
You can customize how diary entries look in your server!

Use `/settings` to configure:
• Which fields to show/hide
• Timestamp format
• Thumbnail priority
• Embed color
• Role pings
• And much more!

*This is a one-time message. Visit `/settings` anytime to customize.*
info.cmds.main_desc: Click a category below to view commands:
info.cmds.main_footer: Use buttons below to view command categories
info.cmds.cat_tracking_value: Add, remove, and manage tracked users
info.cmds.user_desc: Commands available to all members of **{guild}**
info.cmds.user_general_value:
`/help` - Get help with the bot
`/features` - See everything this bot can do
`/commands` - View all available commands
`/botstatus` - View bot status and statistics
`/uptime` - View bot uptime and availability
`/changelog` - View the most recent bot update
`/version` - View bot version
`/privacy` - View privacy policy
`/serializd` - Learn about Serializd
`/timezone` - Set your personal timezone for timestamps
`/bots` - View Kjernes Tracker Bots
`/opt-out` - Remove yourself from tracking and block future adds
`/opt-in` - Allow the bot to track you again
info.cmds.user_profile_value:
`/profile` - Browse a user's Serializd profile
`/upcoming` - View upcoming episodes for tracked shows
`/listusers` - View all tracked Serializd users
`/sharelink add` - Share your Serializd/Letterboxd links
`/sharelink edit` - Update your existing sharelink
`/stats` - View server and global statistics
`/patreon` - Support the bot and view supporters
`/donate` - Support the bot (alias for /patreon)
info.cmds.setup_initial_value:
`/setup` - Interactive setup wizard
`/setchannel [field] [channel]` - Set channels for bot features
   • diary - Diary entry posts
   • sharelink - User sharelink posts
   • commands - Command usage restriction
   • changelog - Bot update announcements
   • new_episodes - New episode announcements
info.cmds.setup_custom_value:
`/settings` - Unified settings menu (channels, customization, diary display)
   • 📺 Channels: Set diary, changelog, sharelink channels
   • 🎨 Customization: Embed color, anonymous mode
   • 📖 Diary Display: Toggle fields, formats, labels
`/setcolor` - Set custom embed color for this server
info.cmds.setup_perms_value:
`/roleadd` - Assign a user or role to a permission group (admin/mod/user)
`/roleremove` - Remove a user or role from a permission group
`/roleview` - View groups, assigned members, and toggle command access per group
info.cmds.setup_quickstart_value: New to the bot? Run `/setup` for an interactive wizard, then customize with `/settings`!
info.cmds.tracking_mgmt_value:
`/adduser` - Track a Serializd user
`/removeuser` - Stop tracking a user
`/listusers` - Show all tracked users
`/edituser` - Link a Discord user to a tracked Serializd username
`/testuser` - Test if user's diary can be fetched
`/clearallusers` - Remove all tracked users (requires confirmation)
info.cmds.tracking_tips_value:
• Use `/testuser` before adding to verify the username
• Usernames are case-insensitive
• Only the latest entry is posted when adding a new user
info.cmds.mgmt_other_value:
`/sharelink clear` - Clear a user's sharelink
`/setanonymous` - Toggle anonymous mode (hide server from global stats)
`/exportconfig` - Export server settings as a shareable code
`/importconfig` - Import settings from a config code
`/auditlog` - View recent settings changes for this server
info.cmds.mgmt_other_discordlink: `/setdiscordlink` - Set a Discord invite link shown in global stats
info.cmds.rules_private_value: By default your server shows as **Guild #XXXX** in global stats. An admin must opt in with `/setanonymous` (and agree to these rules) to show the real name.
info.cmds.rules_enforce_value: Offensive names are auto-filtered from global stats. The bot owner can force a server anonymous and lock it from going public again.
info.features.p1_footer: Page 1/2 - press Next for more features | {footer}
info.features.diary_value:
Auto-polls Serializd every {minutes} and posts new entries to Discord
Shows ratings, reviews, episode info & direct links
info.features.profiles_value:
Browse any tracked user's Serializd profile interactively
Filter by rating, watch status, or time period
See watch counts, recent logs, and episode breakdowns
info.features.stats_value:
Server stats: top watchers & trending shows across 7/30/90 days
Global leaderboards across all servers
🌐 Global and 🏰 Guild monthly winner boards
info.features.recaps_value:
Auto-posts on Mondays (weekly) and the 1st of each month
Top 5 watchers + top 5 shows for the period
Configure the channel in `/settings` > Recaps
info.features.alerts_value:
Tracks your users' watching lists from Serializd
Announces in a dedicated channel when episodes air
Use `/upcoming` to preview what's airing soon - set channel in `/settings`
info.features.p2_footer: Page 2/2 - use `/commands` to see all commands | {footer}
info.features.group_value:
When multiple tracked users log the same show, the bot merges them
into a single embed showing everyone's ratings and reactions
Configure the time window in `/settings` > Group Diary
info.features.sharelinks_value:
`/sharelink add` - Submit your Serializd & Letterboxd profile links
`/sharelink edit` - Update your existing sharelink
Set a sharelink channel so submissions are posted publicly for the server
info.features.custom_value:
All customization lives in `/settings` - custom embed colors,
toggle/rename diary fields (rating, liked, status, season, etc.),
author format, thumbnail priority, watch status filter & more
info.features.perms_value:
Three built-in permission groups: **Admin**, **Mod**, and **User**
Assign Discord roles or members to groups with `/roleadd`
Toggle individual commands per group with `/roleview`
Set a ping role for new diary entry notifications via `/diary format`
info.features.changelog_value:
Set a changelog channel to receive automatic bot update announcements
Use `/changelog` to view the most recent update and `/uptime` for availability stats
Anonymous mode hides your server from global leaderboards - toggle in `/settings`
info.uptime.title: 📡 Bot Uptime
info.serializd.title: 📺 What is Serializd?
info.serializd.desc:
**Serializd** is a social platform for tracking and discovering TV shows, similar to Letterboxd for movies.

Track what you watch, rate episodes, write reviews, and share your TV journey with friends!
info.serializd.features_value:
📝 **Diary Entries** - Log every episode you watch
⭐ **Ratings & Reviews** - Share your thoughts on shows
📊 **Statistics** - Track your viewing habits
👥 **Social** - Follow friends and discover new shows
📱 **Cross-Platform** - Web, iOS, and Android apps
info.serializd.howbot_value:
This bot automatically posts your Serializd diary entries to Discord!

• Checks for new entries every {minutes}
• Shares your watch activity with your server
• Track multiple users in one server
• Customize how entries look with `/settings`
info.serializd.start_value:
1. Create a free account at [serializd.com](https://www.serializd.com/)
2. Start logging the shows you watch
3. Ask a server admin to add your username with `/adduser`
4. Your diary entries will auto-post to Discord!
info.admininfo.title: ⚙️ Server Configuration
info.admininfo.desc: Current bot settings for this server
info.admininfo.perms_value:
👑 **Admin:** {admin} assignment(s)
🛡️ **Mod:** {mod} assignment(s)
👤 **User:** everyone (default)
Use `/roleview` to manage groups
info.help.title: 🤖 Serializd Bot Help
info.help.desc: Track Serializd diary entries in Discord!
info.help.quickstart_value:
**Interactive Setup:** `/setup` - Step-by-step wizard (Admin)

**Or Manual Setup:**
1. `/setchannel` - Set diary channel (Admin)
2. `/adduser username` - Track a user (Admin)
3. `/setchangelog` - Get bot updates (Admin, optional)
4. `/profile username` - Browse their profile
info.help.commands_value:
• `/features` - See everything this bot can do
• `/commands` - See all commands
• `/privacy` - View privacy policy
info.bots.title: 🤖 Kjernes Tracker Bots
info.privacy.title: 🔒 Privacy Policy
info.privacy.desc: Here's a simple breakdown of what data this bot stores and why.
info.privacy.store_value:
• **Serializd usernames** you ask us to track
• **Server settings** (channels, embed color, role permissions)
• **Diary entry IDs** already posted (to avoid duplicates)
• **Watch history & episode alerts** from your Serializd watching list
• **Sharelinks** you voluntarily submit via `/sharelink`
• **Viewing stats** (show names, dates) used for `/stats`
info.privacy.never_value:
• Message content or chat history
• Passwords, tokens, or credentials
• Private Serializd account data
• IP addresses or device info
info.privacy.retention_value:
• All server data is **auto-deleted {hours} hours** after the bot is removed
• Diary entry records older than **14 days** are cleaned up automatically
• Viewing stats and watching list data older than **30 days** are removed
• Episode alert history older than **90 days** is cleared
• You can request immediate deletion via the support server
info.privacy.controls_value:
• Use `/listusers` and `/stats` to see what's tracked
• Remove any tracked user anytime with `/removeuser`
• Remove the bot entirely - data auto-clears in {hours}h
• Contact support for immediate manual deletion
info.privacy.footer: {bot} • All data stored securely in local database
info.changelog.none:
ℹ️ No changelogs have been published yet.
Check back after the next bot update!
info.upcoming.no_link:
❌ {user} doesn't have a linked Serializd account.
Ask an admin to link them with `/edituser`.
info.upcoming.no_tracked:
❌ No users are being tracked in this server.
Use `/adduser` to start tracking users.
info.upcoming.no_watching: 📺 No shows currently being watched by {target}.
info.upcoming.none_found: 📺 No upcoming episodes found in the next 7 days for {target}.
info.upcoming.title: 📺 Upcoming Episodes
info.upcoming.subtitle: Episodes airing in the next 7 days
info.upcoming.error: ❌ An error occurred while fetching upcoming episodes.
